name: Maya Thompson
headline: Final-year Computer Systems Engineering graduate
resume_bullets: Built a Python automation tool that cleaned telemetry CSV files with Pandas and produced weekly data visualisation summaries for a capstone team.
Created a React and TypeScript web app for project tracking, integrating REST APIs and SQLite-backed task storage.
Implemented STM32 firmware in Embedded C for a CAN-based sensor node, including UART logging and I2C sensor reads.
Used Git and GitHub for version control across university projects and led project ownership for a multidisciplinary capstone team.
Presented technical communication updates to academic supervisors and industry mentors during sprint reviews.

repository_evidence.evidence: Dockerfile found for the Python automation service, but Docker is not mentioned in the resume.
GitHub Actions CI/CD workflow runs Python tests on pull requests.
README documents REST API setup, SQLite database schema, and project ownership decisions.
